title: rosa × dumetorum f. submitis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. submitis is a synonym for Rosa rugosa, a type of fragrant, pink-flowering rose native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa rugosa include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and hips of Rosa rugosa can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
